summary: Classifies Java class/interface nodes by Spring decorator, emits SpringKgNode rows, and wires BELONGS_TO edges from each decorated class to its contained method/property/field children.
verification: package-local vitest: annotation-engine.test.ts — 6 cases, all passing. Fixture-derived output captured below.

cases.note: handoffTeam() returns 'team-d-runtime' — entity is skipped (null from classifyNode)

edgeEvidence.child: method | property | field node whose containing edge source == annotated class id

notes: All node ids use sha256(kind|codegraphNodeId|filePath|qualifiedName).slice(0, 32) prefixed by kind — deterministic across runs.
FeignClient metadata extraction tries name= first, then value=, matching T12 contract only.
BELONGS_TO is only emitted for child.kind in [method, property, field].
@ConfigurationProperties triggers handoffTeam() and returns null — no symbol emitted.
Decorator matching is case-insensitive substring (findDecorator checks decorator.toLowerCase().includes(annotation.toLowerCase())).
Evidence is fixture-derived from the package-local verified test suite — no live springkg.db integration exists yet (Team A persistence has not landed).
